---
title: "Jyotiraditya Pradhan"
---

I'm a fourth year economics undergraduate at [Azim Premji University, Bengaluru](https://azimpremjiuniversity.edu.in/). My broad interests lie across microeconomics, development, and methods of statistical inference.

My current research looks to model labour market transitions using markov chains. I'm also working as a research assistant in a project studying the phenomenon of ID blocking of gig workers. 

PS: Love to chat; feel free to reach out! <br>
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:japrad26@gmail.com)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jyotiraditya-pradhan-507858235/)
[{{< fa brands square-github >}}](https://github.com/JaPrad)
